name: Adam Ray
bio: Adam Ray is an American comedian, actor, and podcast host raised in Seattle. He is widely known for his Dr. Phil parody character, which he developed into live shows at the Comedy Store and a 2024 Netflix special. He hosts the podcast About Last Night and has written for MTV and Comedy Central.

timeline.ev: Begins performing stand-up as the Dr. Phil parody character
Launches monthly Dr. Phil LIVE shows at the Comedy Store
Netflix special Adam Ray Is Dr. Phil airs

bits.t: Dr Phil LIVE! REWIND in the Belly Room
